description_long: This ornate ceiling-mounted sconce features a central stem with elaborate detailing, supporting eight gracefully curved arms that each hold a lampshade. The shades are semi-translucent and appear to be made of a light gray or taupe fabric, diffusing the light softly. The arms and central structure are finished in a white or off-white color, possibly painted metal, with decorative elements such as small hanging pendants and intricate scrollwork. The overall design is symmetrical and balanced, with each arm radiating outward evenly from the center. The fixture is suspended from a matching decorative ceiling mount, which continues the motif of elegant curves and flourishes. The sconce exudes a classic, vintage charm, reminiscent of traditional European chandeliers.
description: A classic, ornate ceiling sconce with eight curved arms, fabric lampshades, and decorative pendants in a white finish. The design is symmetrical and vintage-inspired.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eight arms and lampshades evenly spaced, with the central stem and decorative ceiling mount clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, revealing the depth of the arms and the arrangement of the hanging pendants beneath each shade.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, similar to view 1, highlighting the symmetry and the curvature of the arms from a different perspective.
description_view_3: Back view, nearly identical to the front, maintaining the symmetrical appearance and showing the rear alignment of the arms and shades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, classic chandelier style with ornate scrollwork and hanging pendants, evoking traditional European elegance.
